name: Dead / Discharged Starter Battery
description: Battery voltage has dropped below operating threshold (e.g. < 11.5V) causing cranking failure.

name: Corroded Battery Terminals
description: White/green lead sulfate deposits on terminal posts insulating electrical current.

name: Carbon Fouled Spark Plug
description: Dark dry carbon soot deposits bridging spark gap, causing combustion misfires.

name: Loose Drive Chain
description: Chain slack exceeds standard tolerance (25-30mm), causing rattling or sprocket wear.

name: Air in Hydraulic Brake Lines
description: Air bubbles trapped inside hydraulic calipers compressing easily and causing spongy braking.

name: Rear Tyre Puncture
description: Loss of air pressure caused by sharp objects penetrating tire thread casing.
